# BP-143 variant negative: a go-redis Set Result error is checked.
lang: go
file: BP-143-variant-safe.go
variant: redis-set-result-checked
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"

	"github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

func saveName(ctx context.Context, rdb *redis.Client, key, value string) error {
	if _, err := rdb.Set(ctx, key, value, 0).Result(); err != nil {
		return fmt.Errorf("save name: %w", err)
	}
	return nil
}
